overall.description: Gameplay footage from a truck driving simulator showing a first-person perspective from inside a Mercedes truck cabin navigating through heavy snowfall at night. The driver approaches and passes through a toll plaza, continues past a tram station, and drives through a tunnel on a multi-lane highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane highway approaching toll plaza

events.description: approaching toll plaza with overhead gantry signs becoming visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on snow-covered highway, maintaining lane position while approaching the toll plaza

notable_agents.action: truck visible in left lane traveling in same direction ahead of ego

entered.detail: illuminated instrument panel with speedometer and gauges visible in cabin
Mercedes logo steering wheel with driver hands visible
navigation screen mounted on dashboard showing route map
metal guardrails lining both sides of the snowy highway
large green directional signs suspended over the highway
multi-lane asphalt road covered with snow and ice
heavy snow particles falling and accumulating on windshield

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from inside a truck cabin driving on a snow-covered highway at night. Heavy snow falls continuously as the truck approaches a toll plaza, with overhead signs becoming visible in the distance. The dashboard instruments are illuminated, and occasional vehicles pass in adjacent lanes.

scene_state.functional_zone: toll plaza with multiple booth lanes and overhead gantries

events.description: slowing down significantly to navigate through toll booth lane
passing through toll barrier and accelerating slightly while exiting the plaza

agents.ego_description: slowing down to navigate through the toll booth lane, passing the barrier, then proceeding through the plaza area

entered.detail: concrete toll booth buildings with windows and payment stations
automated barrier arm blocking the lane until passed
wide concrete paved area with multiple toll lanes
large metal structure spanning across the toll plaza with signage

segments.scene_description: The truck enters the toll plaza area, slowing down to pass through the toll booth lane. The environment becomes semi-covered by overhead gantries, with concrete surfaces replacing the snow-covered highway. The truck passes through the barrier and navigates the plaza before exiting toward the highway merge.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp and merge area passing tram station

events.description: exiting toll plaza and turning left onto the highway merge ramp
passing tram station with stationary tram visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: navigating a left turn out of the toll plaza then merging onto the highway while passing a tram station on the left

notable_agents.action: stationary tram parked at the platform on the left side of the road

entered.detail: long passenger tram with illuminated windows stopped at station
covered platform structure with lighting adjacent to the tram
dark tunnel opening with lights visible at the far end of the road

segments.scene_description: After exiting the toll plaza, the truck turns left onto a merge ramp and passes a tram station with a stationary tram on the left. The road continues toward a tunnel entrance visible in the distance, with snow continuing to fall on the asphalt surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated concrete highway tunnel with reflective walls

events.description: entering tunnel, transitioning from snowy outdoor environment to enclosed indoor space
approaching tunnel exit, snowy landscape and night sky becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the illuminated tunnel, heading toward the exit visible in the distance

entered.detail: smooth concrete tunnel walls with reflective white paint and emergency markers
continuous row of overhead lights illuminating the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The truck enters the tunnel, leaving the falling snow behind. The environment becomes a narrow enclosed space with smooth concrete walls and continuous overhead lighting. The truck drives steadily through the tunnel toward the exit, where snow and night sky are visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane highway continuing from tunnel exit

events.description: exiting tunnel back into heavy snowfall and snowy road conditions

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snowy highway after exiting the tunnel, maintaining steady speed on the snow-covered surface

notable_agents.action: vehicle with headlights visible traveling in the opposite direction on the left

entered.detail: blue directional signs indicating routes and exits
heavy snow particles resuming as the truck exits the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The truck exits the tunnel and immediately re-enters the heavy snowfall. The scene returns to the open highway environment with snow-covered roads and falling snow visible in the headlights. The truck continues driving along the multi-lane highway with guardrails visible on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a truck cabin as it navigates a snowy night highway, transitioning from an open road through a structured toll plaza and toward a tunnel. It begins on a snow-covered highway under heavy snowfall, with illuminated dashboard instruments visible as the truck approaches distant overhead signs. As the vehicle slows, the open road shifts into the semi-covered environment of a toll plaza, where concrete surfaces replace the snow and the truck passes beneath overhead gantries and through a barrier. The scene then expands as the truck exits the plaza and turns left onto a merge ramp, passing a stationary tram at a station. Finally, the camera tracks forward along the asphalt as the truck heads toward a tunnel entrance visible through the falling snow.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as the truck transitions from a sheltered tunnel back into a harsh, snowy night. It begins with the vehicle entering a narrow enclosed space, leaving the falling snow behind for smooth concrete walls and steady overhead lighting. As the truck drives forward, the enclosed environment gradually opens toward a distant point of light where the night sky and snow become visible at the tunnel's exit. The scene then shifts abruptly back to the open highway as the truck emerges from the tunnel, immediately re-entering the heavy snowfall. Finally, the camera continues along the multi-lane road, with headlights cutting through the flurry and guardrails lining the snow-covered path.
